title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: A podcast episode with economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell examining questions about how AI wealth will be distributed globally. Topics include optimal taxation and redistribution, whether capital's economic share grows or shrinks as AI improves, and strategies for developing nations to benefit from AI advances.
